title: AsLeaderBoard
description: Fully configurable leaderboard plugin with GUI, chat, and hologram support. Track Money, Kills, Deaths with PlaceholderAPI integration!
body:
# 🏆 AsLeaderBoard ### Ultimate Multi-Stats Leaderboard System **by ItzAzeem | AsDevs** [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Us-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/xRW5rdAvs5) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/v1.2.4-Release-brightgreen)](https://modrinth.com) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue)](https://modrinth.com) [![Spigot](https://img.shields.io/badge/Spigot-1.16--1.21+-orange)](https://www.spigotmc.org/) [![PlaceholderAPI](https://img.shields.io/badge/PlaceholderAPI-Supported-blue)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ## ✨ Features | Feature | Support | |----------|----------| | Money Leaderboards | ✅ | | Kills Leaderboards | ✅ | | Deaths Leaderboards | ✅ | | Playtime Leaderboards | ✅ | | GUI Menus | ✅ | | Chat Leaderboards | ✅ | | Holograms | ✅ | | PlaceholderAPI | ✅ | | Vault | ✅ | | Smart Caching | ✅ | --- ## 🚀 What's New in v1.2.4 - ⌚ Playtime Leaderboards - 🏷 Rank / Prefix Support - 🔧 Placeholder Fixes - ⚡ Performance Improvements --- ## 🖥️ Overview & Showcase (soon) --- ## 🔌 PlaceholderAPI ### Top Placeholders ```text %asleaderboard_top_1_money_player% %asleaderboard_top_1_have_money% %asleaderboard_top_1_kills_player% %asleaderboard_top_1_have_kills% %asleaderboard_top_1_death_player% %asleaderboard_top_1_have_death% %asleaderboard_top_1_playtime_player% %asleaderboard_top_1_have_playtime% ``` ### Personal Placeholders ``` %asleaderboard_player_money_value% %asleaderboard_player_money_rank% %asleaderboard_player_kills_value% %asleaderboard_player_kills_rank% %asleaderboard_player_death_value% %asleaderboard_player_death_rank% %asleaderboard_player_playtime_value% %asleaderboard_player_playtime_rank% ``` ### Rank & Value ``` %asleaderboard_rank_money% %asleaderboard_rank_kills% %asleaderboard_rank_death% %asleaderboard_rank_playtime% %asleaderboard_value_money% %asleaderboard_value_kills% %asleaderboard_value_death% %asleaderboard_value_playtime% ``` ## 📜 Commands | Command | Description | |----------|-------------| | `/leaderboard` | Open GUI | | `/lb money` | Money Top | | `/lb kills` | Kills Top | | `/lb deaths` | Deaths Top | | `/lb playtime` | Playtime Top | | `/leaderboard reload` | Reload Plugin | --- ## 🔑 Permissions | Permission | Description | |------------|-------------| | `asleaderboard.use` | Use plugin | | `asleaderboard.reload` | Reload plugin | | `asleaderboard.admin` | Admin access | --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Download **AsLeaderBoard.jar** 2. Place it in `/plugins` 3. Install **Vault** 4. Install **PlaceholderAPI** *(Optional)* 5. Restart Server --- ## 🖥️ Compatibility | Software | Versions | |-----------|-----------| | Paper | 1.16 - 1.21+ | | Spigot | 1.16 - 1.21+ | | Purpur | 1.16 - 1.21+ | | Java | 17+ | --- ## 💬 Support | Platform | Link | |-----------|------| | Discord | https://discord.gg/xRW5rdAvs5 | | developer | itzazeem.as | ---
### ❤️ Made with Love by ItzAzeem | AsDevs
```
